🔍 PWA Test Page - Montessori OS

✅ Manifest Check

Your manifest.json should be loading correctly now with proper icon references.

🎨 Icon Files

Check if these icons are loading:

SVG Icon

192x192 Icon

512x512 Icon

🔧 Service Worker

Check DevTools → Application → Service Workers to see if it's registered and running.

Console should show: "PWA Service Worker registered successfully"

📱 PWA Installation

Look for the install prompt in your browser's address bar (Chrome/Edge) or share menu (Safari).

⚠️ Next Steps

You still need to convert the SVG icon to PNG files at 192x192 and 512x512 resolutions.

Use online tools like:

  • Convertio
  • CloudConvert

🧪 Testing Commands

In DevTools Console, run these commands:

// Check if service worker is registered
navigator.serviceWorker.getRegistrations()

// Check manifest
navigator.standalone

// Check PWA support
'serviceWorker' in navigator
